# Ship.Tires

Ship.Tires is a US-based online tire retailer offering free delivery on every order to all 50 states. The store carries 34 curated tire brands, 800+ models, and 307,000+ tires for cars, trucks, and SUVs. Tires ship to your door or directly to a local installer in 3-7 business days. Call or text (279) 238-8473 to order.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://ship.tires): Main landing page with tire search by size, vehicle, or brand
- [All Tires](https://ship.tires/tires): Browse all 34 brands and their tire models
- [Locations](https://ship.tires/locations): Free tire delivery to 1,000+ US cities across all 50 states
- [Vehicle Lookup](https://ship.tires/vehicle-lookup): Find compatible tires by year, make, and model
- [Rankings](https://ship.tires/rankings): Tire brand and model rankings
- [Search](https://ship.tires/search): Search tires by size, brand, or category
- [Contact](https://ship.tires/contact): Request a quote or get in touch
- [FAQ](https://ship.tires/faq): Frequently asked questions about ordering and shipping
- [Shipping](https://ship.tires/shipping): Shipping policy and delivery details
- [Returns](https://ship.tires/returns): 30-day return policy and refund information
- [About](https://ship.tires/about): About Ship.Tires
- [Blog](https://ship.tires/blog): Tire guides, tips, and industry news
- [Racing](https://ship.tires/racing): Motorsport coverage (F1, NASCAR, Le Mans, IndyCar)
- [Racing Tech](https://ship.tires/racing-tech): Technical articles on racing tire technology
- [Installers](https://ship.tires/installers): Find tire installers by state, city, and zip code

## Tire Brands (34)

Advanta, BFGoodrich, Bridgestone, Continental, Cooper, Dunlop, Falken, Firestone, General Tire, Goodyear, Hankook, Hoosier, Kenda, Kumho, Laufenn, Maxxis, Michelin, Mickey Thompson, Nankang, Nexen, Nitto, Nokian, Pirelli, Power King, Radar, Range Finder, Riken, Sumitomo, Toyo, Uniroyal, Vitour, Vogue, Vredestein, Yokohama

## Tire Categories

All-Season, Winter/Snow, Performance, All-Terrain, Touring, Truck & SUV, Highway, Mud-Terrain

## How It Works

1. Find tires by size, vehicle, or brand at https://ship.tires
2. Request a quote or call (279) 238-8473
3. Tires ship free to your door or your local installer
4. Get installed at any tire shop near you

## Content & Resources

- [Blog](https://ship.tires/blog): Tire guides, tips, and how-to articles (tire size guide, all-season vs winter, when to replace tires, speed ratings explained)
- [Racing](https://ship.tires/racing): Motorsport coverage — F1, NASCAR, Le Mans, IndyCar tire technology and race reports
- [Racing Tech](https://ship.tires/racing-tech): Technical articles on racing tire technology (compounds, wet weather tech, temperature management)
- [Rankings](https://ship.tires/rankings): Tire performance rankings by category (best wet weather, track day, all-terrain, touring)
- [Installers](https://ship.tires/installers): Find tire installers by state, city, and zip code

## URL Patterns

- Brand pages: https://ship.tires/tires/{brand} (e.g., /tires/michelin)
- Model pages: https://ship.tires/tires/{brand}/{model} (e.g., /tires/michelin/pilot-sport-4s)
- Brand+Size pages: https://ship.tires/tires/{brand}/size/{size} (e.g., /tires/michelin/size/225-65r17)
- Size pages: https://ship.tires/tires/size/{size} (e.g., /tires/size/225-65r17)
- Location pages: https://ship.tires/locations/{state}/{city} (e.g., /locations/california/los-angeles)
- City+Size pages: https://ship.tires/locations/{state}/{city}/size/{size}
- City+Brand pages: https://ship.tires/locations/{state}/{city}/{brand}
- City+Brand+Size pages: https://ship.tires/locations/{state}/{city}/{brand}/{size}
- Vehicle pages: https://ship.tires/tires/vehicle/{make} (e.g., /tires/vehicle/honda)
- Vehicle model pages: https://ship.tires/tires/vehicle/{make}/{model}
- Vehicle year pages: https://ship.tires/tires/vehicle/{make}/{model}/{year} (e.g., /tires/vehicle/honda/civic/2024)
- City+Vehicle pages: https://ship.tires/locations/{state}/{city}/vehicle/{make}/{model} (e.g., /locations/california/los-angeles/vehicle/honda/civic)
- Installer state pages: https://ship.tires/installers/{state_abbr}
- Installer city pages: https://ship.tires/installers/{state_abbr}/{city}
- Installer zip pages: https://ship.tires/installers/{state_abbr}/{city}/{zip}

## API Endpoints

- GET /api/tires/search?size=225/65R17&brand=michelin -- Search tires by size, brand, category, price
- GET /api/tires/brands -- List all 34 brands with models and pricing
- GET /api/locations/search?q=los+angeles -- Find cities with free tire shipping
- GET /api/vehicle/tires?make=Toyota&model=Camry&year=2024 -- Look up tires by vehicle
- GET /api/markdown?path=/tires/michelin -- Get any page as AI-friendly markdown
- POST /api/contact -- Submit a tire inquiry or quote request

## Per-Entity LLM Files

- Brand: https://ship.tires/tires/{brand}/llm.txt
- Model: https://ship.tires/tires/{brand}/{model}/llm.txt
- Size: https://ship.tires/tires/size/{size}/llm.txt
- Vehicle make: https://ship.tires/tires/vehicle/{make}/llm.txt
- Vehicle model: https://ship.tires/tires/vehicle/{make}/{model}/llm.txt
- Location: https://ship.tires/locations/{state}/{city}/llm.txt
- Installer: https://ship.tires/installers/{state_abbr}/{city}/{zip}/llm.txt

## AI & Agent Discovery

- OpenAPI spec: https://ship.tires/openapi.json
- Agent card: https://ship.tires/.well-known/ai-agent.json
- AI plugin: https://ship.tires/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Full inventory: https://ship.tires/llms-full.txt
- Append .md to any page URL for markdown content

## Contact

- Phone: (279) 238-8473
- Email: info@ship.tires
- Website: https://ship.tires
- Based in Sacramento, CA

## For More Details

- Summary version: https://ship.tires/llm.txt
- Full version: https://ship.tires/llm-full.txt
- Complete inventory: https://ship.tires/llms-full.txt
